keyEvents.text: Alistair Johnston (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Amar Memic (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Canada 0, Bosnia and Herzegovina 1. Jovo Lukic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) header from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Sead Kolasinac with a headed pass following a corner.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Ermedin Demirovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jovo Lukic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Nikola Vasilj (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Delay in match because of an injury Tani Oluwaseyi (Canada).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Luc De Fougerolles (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Canada. Jacob Shaffelburg replaces Liam Millar.
Substitution, Canada. Promise David replaces Jonathan David.
Substitution, Canada. Ali Ahmed replaces Tajon Buchanan.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Samed Bazdar replaces Jovo Lukic.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Armin Gigovic replaces Ivan Basic.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Ivan Sunjic replaces Esmir Bajraktarevic.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Kerim Alajbegovic replaces Amar Memic.
Substitution, Canada. Cyle Larin replaces Tani Oluwaseyi.
Goal! Canada 1, Bosnia and Herzegovina 1. Cyle Larin (Canada) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Promise David.
Delay in match because of an injury Sead Kolasinac (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Dzenis Burnic replaces Sead Kolasinac because of an injury.
Substitution, Canada. Jonathan Osorio replaces Stephen Eustaquio.
Nikola Katic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Canada 1, Bosnia and Herzegovina 1.
